flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 52% at Westmoreland County Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.6k vs 5.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Westmoreland County Community College rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.5k → $7.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Westmoreland County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Westmoreland County Community College rose 38% between 2006 and 2009 (11.7% → 16.1%).
